title: Nevada AG Ford: AG colleagues & I contemplating Next Steps
description: Aaron Ford, Nevada Attorney General, discusses the recent 6–3 Supreme Court of the United States ruling that struck down tariffs imposed during the Trump administration. He tells Romaine Bostick and Kristine Aquino on "The Close" that the decision was expected and legally justified. (Source: Bloomberg)
